summary: Plan-only PR inventory assessment. No GitHub mutations are permitted by this job. repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-056.

Source PRs:
- #88449 by @ashyyhere: repair dirty merge state, keep the home path boundary fix narrow, and preserve attribution.
- #91217 by @safrano9999: repair failing proof/type checks for the deterministic dummy model path and preserve attribution.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run packages/terminal-core/src/display-string.test.ts src/utils.test.ts
- pnpm -s vitest run src/auto-reply/reply/directive-handling.defaults.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply.before-agent-reply.test.ts src/commands/auth-choice.model-check.test.ts src/commands/model-picker.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Do not merge until Codex /review passes cleanly and merge preflight proves security clearance plus resolved human and bot review comments.

Preserve #91217 source PR credit for @safrano9999 if its deterministic dummy model work is repaired or carried forward.
